calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Mar-10-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Daniel Conrad and Elizabeth Hanowksy for Maria Rockstroh.

Mr. Conrad addressed the issues raised in the Examiner's notes with regard to the extraordinary fees. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.
